scope: UI layout, candidate preview topology completeness, recovery-mode root-cause removal, panel isolation

checks.name: npm ci / Vitest / Vite production build
checks.reason: internal npm registry returned HTTP 503 during dependency download

knownBoundaries: Frontend production build must be executed in the deployment environment before release.
Legacy candidate-plan-v1 rows are rebuilt lazily on first candidate preview request.
This patch does not change structural calculation results, reinforcement calculations or formal design checks.
